title: Gifting CLP Categories
goal: Incorporate top-performing gifting categories into the current Gifting Content Landing Pages (CLPs) to enhance navigation, increase product discoverability, and drive higher conversion rates.
description: To strengthen the impact and usability of the Gifting CLPs, we will enrich them with a selection of high-intent categories and gift ideas. By including the top-performing gifting categories, customers will find it easier to browse and discover relevant products, leading to improved engagement and conversion.
